checks.expected: Review handoff preview health: 3 missing input; see data/human_handoff_resolution_preview.json.
actual: Next operational action: Post YouTube Community manual cards
First handoff step: Review and post manual distribution rows
30-day growth goal: Publish or approve the next platform-native rows, then refresh manual/public metrics to rank formats by results.

Resolve manual distribution gate: 3 approved YouTube Community row(s) need manual posting and public URL logging; open https://www.youtube.com/@lilyroo.artist/community. Use admin/reports/manual-posting-clipboard.md.
Publish runway: 3 approved manual row(s) are ready to post and log from data/experiment_publish_runway.json.

Refresh manual metrics: 6 worksheet row(s) still need new_value entries (blocked_until_new_values_filled); preview with python3 scripts/update_manual_social_stats.py --from-csv --dry-run after filling values.

Collect experiment results: 5 post-result field(s) need new_value plus evidence_note; use admin/reports/experiment-result-clipboard.md; first priority: measure FP-AUTO-260 on Facebook. Direct preview template: python3 scripts/update_experiment_results.py --post-id FP-AUTO-260 --source-row 18 --views VALUE --evidence-note 'SOURCE analytics YYYY-MM-DD' --dry-run. Direct apply template after review: python3 scripts/update_experiment_results.py --post-id FP-AUTO-260 --source-row 18 --views VALUE --evidence-note 'SOURCE analytics YYYY-MM-DD' --apply --refresh-admin. Then preview import with python3 scripts/update_experiment_results.py --from-wide-csv data/experiment_result_entry_wide_template.csv --dry-run after filling data/experiment_result_entry_wide_template.csv.

Re-check checked-pending store links: 7 music site snapshot(s) still have no public URL; next recommended re-check after 2026-06-23T10:11:03.717985+00:00. Run python3 scripts/verify_pending_store_links.py --refresh-admin --step-timeout-seconds 25 then.

Current unlock gate: Review and post manual YouTube Community rows (blocked_until_input); 0 ready, 4 blocked/warning; preview python3 scripts/log_manual_distribution.py --id FP-AUTO-261 --url PUBLIC_URL; see data/promo_unlock_sequence.json.
Review handoff preview health: 3 missing input; see data/human_handoff_resolution_preview.json.
Preview approved backlog reschedule: python3 scripts/reschedule_scheduled_posts.py --approved-backlog --exclude-manual-handoff --start-at '2026-06-23T10:00:00+00:00' --spacing-hours 24
1 approved unpublished posts are past their scheduled time; repair executor/platform blockers or reschedule them.
